name: Entrecote Bercy (Grilled Beef Steak)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle both sides of the steak with salt and pepper.
2. Grill over a hot fire.
3. In a small pan, mix the softened butter with the chopped herbs and shallots until creamy over very low heat.
4. Just before serving, place half the butter on two hot serving plates.
5. Place the cooked steaks on top of the butter and drizzle the remaining butter over the steaks.
6. Serve immediately.
